imageDescription: Deep circular pothole filled with rainwater in the middle of a busy two-lane road; motorbikes are swerving around it.
userDescription: Dangerous pothole near the market turn causing two-wheeler accidents.

imageDescription: Large broken asphalt patch spanning half a lane near an intersection.
userDescription: Road surface collapsed after recent rain.

imageDescription: Long cracked road segment with uneven edges but still passable traffic.
userDescription: Road cracks are expanding across the lane.

imageDescription: Burst underground pipe flooding a residential street and entering shop fronts.
userDescription: Water has been flowing for hours and blocking pedestrians.

imageDescription: Broken roadside tap leaking continuously into the gutter.
userDescription: Public tap valve is broken and wasting water.

imageDescription: Entire row of streetlights off on a dark pedestrian road at night.
userDescription: No lights on this stretch after 7 PM; unsafe for pedestrians.

imageDescription: Single streetlight flickering near a bus stop while neighboring lights work.
userDescription: One light flickers repeatedly.

imageDescription: Large illegal dump of mixed waste spilling onto the road beside a school gate.
userDescription: Garbage pile smells bad and blocks students walking to school.

imageDescription: Overflowing municipal bins with loose trash across a market footpath.
userDescription: Bins have not been cleared for three days.

imageDescription: Open storm drain blocked by debris, causing knee-deep waterlogging during rain.
userDescription: Blocked drain floods the whole junction.

imageDescription: Partially clogged roadside drain with stagnant water and visible plastic.
userDescription: Drain needs cleaning before next rain.

imageDescription: Large tree branch fallen across one lane after a storm.
userDescription: Tree branch is blocking traffic and may damage vehicles.

imageDescription: Small fallen branch blocking part of a footpath.
userDescription: Branch needs removal from sidewalk.

imageDescription: Bent public signboard leaning near a low-traffic lane.
userDescription: Signboard is damaged but not blocking the road.

imageDescription: Road shoulder collapsed next to an uncovered trench.
userDescription: Road edge is broken and unsafe for cyclists.

imageDescription: Cluster of shallow potholes after utility digging work.
userDescription: Small potholes make the road bumpy.

imageDescription: Water leaking from a broken pipe into an electrical utility box area.
userDescription: Pipe leak is close to wiring and needs urgent repair.

imageDescription: Two dead lamps on a residential street with partial lighting from nearby houses.
userDescription: Street is dim and unsafe at night.

imageDescription: Small garbage pile beside a park wall, not yet spilling onto road.
userDescription: Waste has collected near the park entrance.

imageDescription: Drain cover missing on a sidewalk with a deep opening visible.
